steps.title: Factor out x and identify the condition for no solution
steps.content:
Factor out $x$ from the left side:
$$x(-3 + 18p) = 90$$
For a linear equation of the form $ax = b$ to have no solution, the coefficient of $x$ must equal zero while the right side is non-zero (creating a contradiction). Since $90 \neq 0$, we need:
$$-3 + 18p = 0$$

steps.title: Solve for p
steps.content:
From $-3 + 18p = 0$:
$$18p = 3$$
$$p = \frac{3}{18} = \frac{1}{6}$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
